title: neolitsea chinensis
intro: Neolitsea chinensis, also known as Chinese boxwood, is a type of evergreen tree native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Lauraceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Neolitsea chinensis include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting respiratory and gastrointestinal health. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in the form of extracts and capsules to promote overall well-being.
